metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the plugin-architecture-dev SDLC master plugin.

plugins.name: plugin-architecture-dev
plugins.description: Language-agnostic, full-SDLC master plugin. Multi-agent teams and named rosters drive research -> planning -> architecting -> implementation -> review -> testing -> a hook-enforced, evidence-based hard quality gate. Internally pluggable (phases are contribution points, hooks are the event bus).
